subcodes.first_line: The purpose of coming into the world of existence is the attainment of a praiseworthy outcome, and that is faith and certitude and love for the Lord God [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: مقصود از آمدن در عالم وجود تحصيل نتيجهء محمود است و آن ايمان و ايقان و محبّت حضرت يزدان
subcodes.subjects: @bringing forth results; fruit, @consolation and comfort, @soul; spirit after death, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness
